modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need secure ways to store and share data and files.

full_description_text: I’m looking for a safe way to keep and share files. We might need to work with other groups too, so a good spot for that would be great. What options does USD have for this? I just want to make sure everything is secure and follows the rules like FERPA and HIPAA.
short_description: Need secure ways to store and share data and files.
description: I’m looking for a safe way to keep and share files. We might need to work with other groups too, so a good spot for that would be great. What options does USD have for this? I just want to make sure everything is secure and follows the rules like FERPA and HIPAA.
